text.title: PDCA-Reflexion Cycle for SDD
text.summary: The four phases of the Reflexion learning loop mapped to SDD task execution.

rule.statement: Every SDD task execution must follow Plan → Do → Check → Act. Skipping any phase degrades the learning signal.
rule.rationale: Reflexion only improves agent quality when all four phases complete. Skipping Check means no reflection is generated; skipping Act means no memory is updated.

rule.statement: Load session.md (if continuing), keyword-filter patterns.md for relevant patterns, keyword-filter mistakes.md for domain warnings. Summarize in 5 bullets before proceeding.
rule.rationale: Loading the entire patterns.md and mistakes.md burns 5-15k tokens of context budget. Keyword filtering to 3-5 relevant entries is both faster and more precise.

rule.statement: Execute the task with loaded patterns applied. Deviate from patterns only with a documented reason. Track which patterns are used.
rule.rationale: Pattern tracking enables usage-count updates in the Act phase, which in turn updates confidence scores.

rule.statement: Evaluate output against each acceptance criterion using external signals (test results, linter, type checker). Report each AC as PASS or FAIL with evidence. Do not self-report PASS without external signal.
rule.rationale: LLMs in self-evaluation exhibit systematic optimism — they report AC as PASS when they would fail against an independent test suite. External tests must be the authoritative signal.

rule.statement: After any PASS: extract a PAT-NNN entry for patterns.md if a novel successful approach was used. After any FAIL: append a MIS-NNN entry to mistakes.md. Update session.md.
rule.rationale: Reflections written immediately after task completion are accurate. Reflections written at session end produce generic patterns ("write tests first") without project-specific context.

list.item: L1 (Spec review): load domain patterns before analysis
L4 (Pre-code): load coding patterns and mistakes for the task domain
L5 (Post-code): run external tests, generate verbal reflection
L6 (Complete): update memory files, close or update session.md

rule.statement: Set a maximum of 3 Reflexion retry attempts per task. After 3 cycles, escalate to human review.
rule.rationale: Reflexion improves on first and second retry but has diminishing returns. A third failure with updated reflections indicates a gap that verbal reinforcement cannot fix alone.
